TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Maurice Ager == htuw beh kawas 1984 byacing 2 ryax 9 squw qalang Detroit, Michigan beh kya Amerika', nalan unroing na pzyuy' mari na waya'ru kbalay unggak uziy. kinwagiq niya' ga 196 kungxun' kin'usuw niya' ga 92 kungcin . ryax niya' mzyuy' mari' ga aring kawas 2006 ruw pucing kawas 2010. squ beh kawas 2006 byacing 6 ryax 28 ga maki beh pwayzaw giqas sinsyuw NBA ga aring balay na lga maki beh 28 binkgan lalu' niya' ruw alun kya na gluw na Dallas Mavericks la,ruw trang kawas qasa lga ps'rux sas NBA Development Alliance lruw musa' mspung kya la. trang maki' beh mspung na giqas na sinsyuw ga mluw sa The Mavericks min 32 musa' mspung, ruw nanu' squw kawas 07 ruw kawas 08 lga minmpuw sazing musa' mspung la. squw kawas beh 2008 byacing 2 ryax 18 lga, wan nha' tbaziy beh New Jersey Nets quw Ager qasa, ga ini' alax musa' mspung na NBA Development Alliance na'. Pspngan sa kawas 08 — 09 ga, min 20 musa' mspung na The Nets qaniy, babaw niya' lga musa' kbalay uziy beh The Nets beh ruw musa' mspung sa Spain. kawas 2010 byacing te 11 ruw ryax te 11 lga wan laxan na Minnesota Gray Wolves la. zyow na ungak niya' kinbaqan unggak niy Ager ga cingay balay squliq baq uziy ruw sinzyogun nha' kwara' balay uziy. Aring niya' sa mrkyas balay na' ga ktan kya kwara' kinbbaqan niya' squw unggak la. squw kawas te 2013 ga, yas wan nha' sun muciy hiya' quw p'agal qnabu' na EOTM Award producer squw Los Angeles sa kawas qasa. trang kawas qasa uziy ga wan shapyo kya uziy pingaga' niya' phtuw CD niya'. iyat hiya' nanak, nusa' sikining na pkbalay unggak na squliq uaiy na' hiya' qaniy. Pyzng balay blaq kwara' squliq qwas niya' ka sun nha' qwas na saxa' nanak ga — Forever I'm a Spartan, squw kawas te 2010 ga t'aring kukuhak ruw yasa quw siy pziciy metaq kmal na Michigan State University football team muciy simung qwas naha' qwas niya' qasa. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == mauriʦ~ʨe aɣer == ħtuw βeħ kawas~ɕ **** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax * s~ɕquw qalaŋ *etroit, miʦ~ʨħiɣan βeħ kja amerikaʔ, nalan unroiŋ na pzjujʔ mari na wajaʔru kβalaj uŋɣak uzij. kinwaɣiq nijaʔ ɣa *** kuŋxunʔ kinʔus~ɕuw nijaʔ ɣa ** kuŋʦ~ʨin . rjax nijaʔ mzjujʔ mariʔ ɣa ariŋ kawas~ɕ **** ruw puʦ~ʨiŋ kawas~ɕ ****. s~ɕqu βeħ kawas~ɕ **** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax ** ɣa maki βeħ pwajzaw ɣiqas~ɕ s~ɕins~ɕjuw nβa ɣa ariŋ βalaj na lɣa maki βeħ ** βinkɣan laluʔ nijaʔ ruw alun kja na ɣluw na *allas~ɕ ma*eriʦ~ʨks~ɕ la,ruw traŋ kawas~ɕ qas~ɕa lɣa ps~ɕʔrux s~ɕas~ɕ nβa *e*elopment allianʦ~ʨe lruw mus~ɕaʔ ms~ɕpuŋ kja la. traŋ makiʔ βeħ ms~ɕpuŋ na ɣiqas~ɕ na s~ɕins~ɕjuw ɣa mluw s~ɕa tħe ma*eriʦ~ʨks~ɕ min ** mus~ɕaʔ ms~ɕpuŋ, ruw nanuʔ s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ ** ruw kawas~ɕ ** lɣa minmpuw s~ɕaziŋ mus~ɕaʔ ms~ɕpuŋ la. s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ βeħ **** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax ** lɣa, wan nħaʔ tβazij βeħ new *ers~ɕej nets~ɕ quw aɣer qas~ɕa, ɣa iniʔ alax mus~ɕaʔ ms~ɕpuŋ na nβa *e*elopment allianʦ~ʨe naʔ. ps~ɕpŋan s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ** * ** ɣa, min ** mus~ɕaʔ ms~ɕpuŋ na tħe nets~ɕ qanij, βaβaw nijaʔ lɣa mus~ɕaʔ kβalaj uzij βeħ tħe nets~ɕ βeħ ruw mus~ɕaʔ ms~ɕpuŋ s~ɕa s~ɕpain. kawas~ɕ **** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te ** ruw rjax te ** lɣa wan laxan na minnes~ɕota ɣraj wol*es~ɕ la. zjow na uŋak nijaʔ kinβaqan uŋɣak nij aɣer ɣa ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj s~ɕquliq βaq uzij ruw s~ɕinzjoɣun nħaʔ kwaraʔ βalaj uzij. ariŋ nijaʔ s~ɕa mrkjas~ɕ βalaj naʔ ɣa ktan kja kwaraʔ kinββaqan nijaʔ s~ɕquw uŋɣak la. s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ te **** ɣa, jas~ɕ wan nħaʔ s~ɕun muʦ~ʨij ħijaʔ quw pʔaɣal qnaβuʔ na eotm awar* pro*uʦ~ʨer s~ɕquw los~ɕ aŋeles~ɕ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ qas~ɕa. traŋ kawas~ɕ qas~ɕa uzij ɣa wan s~ɕħapjo kja uzij piŋaɣaʔ nijaʔ pħtuw ʦ~ʨ* nijaʔ. ijat ħijaʔ nanak, nus~ɕaʔ s~ɕikiniŋ na pkβalaj uŋɣak na s~ɕquliq uaij naʔ ħijaʔ qanij. pjzŋ βalaj βlaq kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq qwas~ɕ nijaʔ ka s~ɕun nħaʔ qwas~ɕ na s~ɕaxaʔ nanak ɣa * *ore*er iʔm a s~ɕpartan, s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ te **** ɣa tʔariŋ kukuħak ruw jas~ɕa quw s~ɕij pziʦ~ʨij metaq kmal na miʦ~ʨħiɣan s~ɕtate uni*ers~ɕitj *ootβall team muʦ~ʨij s~ɕimuŋ qwas~ɕ naħaʔ qwas~ɕ nijaʔ qas~ɕa. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: == Maurice Ager == htuw beh kawas 1984 byacing 2 ryax 9 squw qalang Detroit, Michigan beh kya Amerika', nalan unroing na pzyuy' mari na waya'ru kbalay unggak uziy. kinwagiq niya' ga 196 kungxun' kin'usuw niya' ga 92 kungcin . ryax niya' mzyuy' mari' ga aring kawas 2006 ruw pucing kawas 2010. squ beh kawas 2006 byacing 6 ryax 28 ga maki beh pwayzaw giqas sinsyuw NBA ga aring balay na lga maki beh 28 binkgan lalu' niya' ruw alun kya na gluw na Dallas Mavericks la,ruw trang kawas qasa lga ps'rux sas NBA Development Alliance lruw musa' mspung kya la. trang maki' beh mspung na giqas na sinsyuw ga mluw sa The Mavericks min 32 musa' mspung, ruw nanu' squw kawas 07 ruw kawas 08 lga minmpuw sazing musa' mspung la. squw kawas beh 2008 byacing 2 ryax 18 lga, wan nha' tbaziy beh New Jersey Nets quw Ager qasa, ga ini' alax musa' mspung na NBA Development Alliance na'. Pspngan sa kawas 08 — 09 ga, min 20 musa' mspung na The Nets qaniy, babaw niya' lga musa' kbalay uziy beh The Nets beh ruw musa' mspung sa Spain. kawas 2010 byacing te 11 ruw ryax te 11 lga wan laxan na Minnesota Gray Wolves la. zyow na ungak niya' kinbaqan unggak niy Ager ga cingay balay squliq baq uziy ruw sinzyogun nha' kwara' balay uziy. Aring niya' sa mrkyas balay na' ga ktan kya kwara' kinbbaqan niya' squw unggak la. squw kawas te 2013 ga, yas wan nha' sun muciy hiya' quw p'agal qnabu' na EOTM Award producer squw Los Angeles sa kawas qasa. trang kawas qasa uziy ga wan shapyo kya uziy pingaga' niya' phtuw CD niya'. iyat hiya' nanak, nusa' sikining na pkbalay unggak na squliq uaiy na' hiya' qaniy. Pyzng balay blaq kwara' squliq qwas niya' ka sun nha' qwas na saxa' nanak ga — Forever I'm a Spartan, squw kawas te 2010 ga t'aring kukuhak ruw yasa quw siy pziciy metaq kmal na Michigan State University football team muciy simung qwas naha' qwas niya' qasa. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == mauriʦ~ʨe aɣer == ħtuw βeħ kawas~ɕ **** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax * s~ɕquw qalaŋ *etroit, miʦ~ʨħiɣan βeħ kja amerikaʔ, nalan unroiŋ na pzjujʔ mari na wajaʔru kβalaj uŋɣak uzij. kinwaɣiq nijaʔ ɣa *** kuŋxunʔ kinʔus~ɕuw nijaʔ ɣa ** kuŋʦ~ʨin . rjax nijaʔ mzjujʔ mariʔ ɣa ariŋ kawas~ɕ **** ruw puʦ~ʨiŋ kawas~ɕ ****. s~ɕqu βeħ kawas~ɕ **** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax ** ɣa maki βeħ pwajzaw ɣiqas~ɕ s~ɕins~ɕjuw nβa ɣa ariŋ βalaj na lɣa maki βeħ ** βinkɣan laluʔ nijaʔ ruw alun kja na ɣluw na *allas~ɕ ma*eriʦ~ʨks~ɕ la,ruw traŋ kawas~ɕ qas~ɕa lɣa ps~ɕʔrux s~ɕas~ɕ nβa *e*elopment allianʦ~ʨe lruw mus~ɕaʔ ms~ɕpuŋ kja la. traŋ makiʔ βeħ ms~ɕpuŋ na ɣiqas~ɕ na s~ɕins~ɕjuw ɣa mluw s~ɕa tħe ma*eriʦ~ʨks~ɕ min ** mus~ɕaʔ ms~ɕpuŋ, ruw nanuʔ s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ ** ruw kawas~ɕ ** lɣa minmpuw s~ɕaziŋ mus~ɕaʔ ms~ɕpuŋ la. s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ βeħ **** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax ** lɣa, wan nħaʔ tβazij βeħ new *ers~ɕej nets~ɕ quw aɣer qas~ɕa, ɣa iniʔ alax mus~ɕaʔ ms~ɕpuŋ na nβa *e*elopment allianʦ~ʨe naʔ. ps~ɕpŋan s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ** * ** ɣa, min ** mus~ɕaʔ ms~ɕpuŋ na tħe nets~ɕ qanij, βaβaw nijaʔ lɣa mus~ɕaʔ kβalaj uzij βeħ tħe nets~ɕ βeħ ruw mus~ɕaʔ ms~ɕpuŋ s~ɕa s~ɕpain. kawas~ɕ **** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te ** ruw rjax te ** lɣa wan laxan na minnes~ɕota ɣraj wol*es~ɕ la. zjow na uŋak nijaʔ kinβaqan uŋɣak nij aɣer ɣa ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj s~ɕquliq βaq uzij ruw s~ɕinzjoɣun nħaʔ kwaraʔ βalaj uzij. ariŋ nijaʔ s~ɕa mrkjas~ɕ βalaj naʔ ɣa ktan kja kwaraʔ kinββaqan nijaʔ s~ɕquw uŋɣak la. s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ te **** ɣa, jas~ɕ wan nħaʔ s~ɕun muʦ~ʨij ħijaʔ quw pʔaɣal qnaβuʔ na eotm awar* pro*uʦ~ʨer s~ɕquw los~ɕ aŋeles~ɕ s~ɕa kawas~ɕ qas~ɕa. traŋ kawas~ɕ qas~ɕa uzij ɣa wan s~ɕħapjo kja uzij piŋaɣaʔ nijaʔ pħtuw ʦ~ʨ* nijaʔ. ijat ħijaʔ nanak, nus~ɕaʔ s~ɕikiniŋ na pkβalaj uŋɣak na s~ɕquliq uaij naʔ ħijaʔ qanij. pjzŋ βalaj βlaq kwaraʔ s~ɕquliq qwas~ɕ nijaʔ ka s~ɕun nħaʔ qwas~ɕ na s~ɕaxaʔ nanak ɣa * *ore*er iʔm a s~ɕpartan, s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ te **** ɣa tʔariŋ kukuħak ruw jas~ɕa quw s~ɕij pziʦ~ʨij metaq kmal na miʦ~ʨħiɣan s~ɕtate uni*ers~ɕitj *ootβall team muʦ~ʨij s~ɕimuŋ qwas~ɕ naħaʔ qwas~ɕ nijaʔ qas~ɕa. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
